title: rhinanthus crista-galli var. minor
intro: Rhinanthus crista-galli var. minor, also known as the small yellow rampion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the snapdragon family and is native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rhinanthus crista-galli var. minor include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or dried extract, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams for various health purposes.
